title: colysis raciborskii
side_effects: Colysis raciborskii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's compounds can also cause gastrointestinal problems, including nausea and vomiting. In rare cases, overconsumption of the plant's extracts may lead to liver damage and kidney dysfunction. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using Colysis raciborskii or any other plant for medicinal purposes.
